app.title: Famoso Fuego — Reservations
app.scaffoldNotice: Scaffold ready. Auth, routes, and features land in Phase 2.

auth.loginPrompt: Sign in with your staff account.
auth.unauthorized: You don't have access to this area.
auth.missingGroupsHelp: Your access token is missing the cognito:groups claim.

staff.dashboardWelcome: Phase 2 placeholder. Feature pages land in Phase 5.

events.confirmDelete: Delete event "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

field.name: Event name
field.statusHint: Deactivating an ACTIVE event releases its date lock so a new event can take that slot.

frequentClients.confirmDelete: Delete frequent client "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

field.name: Name
field.phoneHint: International format with country code, e.g. +528991234567 or +12125551234.

tables.heading: Default tables
tables.hint: Pre-set table reservations and payment defaults for this frequent client. One row per table.
tables.empty: No tables yet. Add the first one below.

settings.listDescription: Operating timezones, payment windows, customer-facing toggles.

field.operatingTzHint: Used for deadlines and the business-day cutoff. Example: America/Chicago.
field.operatingDayCutoffHourHint: Hour at which a new business day starts (0–23). Reservations after midnight but before this hour count toward the prior calendar day.
field.autoSendSquareLinkSms: Auto-send SMS when a Square payment link is created
field.autoSendSquareLinkSmsHint: When on, creating a payment link triggers an SMS to the customer's phone immediately.
field.cashReceiptNumberRequired: Require receipt number for cash payments
field.smsEnabledHint: When off, no SMS messages will be sent regardless of other settings.
field.maxReservationsPerPhonePerEvent: Max reservations per phone per event
field.showClientFacingMapHint: When off, /map and /availability return 404 to the public.

clientsCrm.searchHint: Type at least 3 digits and hit Search to find customers across all events.
clientsCrm.selectHint: Select a result on the left to see details.
clientsCrm.tooMany: + {{count}} more — narrow with the filter to see them.

checkIn.title: Check-In
checkIn.subtitle: Validate entry at the door by scanning check-in passes.
checkIn.cameraNotReady: Scanner view is not ready yet.
checkIn.notSupported: Camera scanning is not supported on this browser. Use manual input below.
checkIn.noToken: No token detected. Try scanning again.

checkInPassPage.heading: THIS IS CONFIRMATION
checkInPassPage.subheading: Thank you for your reservation. Be ready for an unforgettable night.
checkInPassPage.invalidBody: This check-in link does not include a token. Ask staff to resend your pass.
checkInPassPage.notFoundBody: We couldn't locate this pass. Ask staff to reissue it.
checkInPassPage.contactNote: Need to make a change? Contact staff before 10:00 PM on your reservation date.

adminUsers.confirmDisable: Disable {{username}}? They lose API access immediately.

field.emailHint: An invitation will be sent here. Cognito uses email as username.
field.name: Display name

holds.listDescription: Pending table holds awaiting reservation conversion.
holds.empty: No active holds for this event.
holds.confirmRelease: Release the hold on table {{tableId}}? The table becomes available immediately.

reservations.listDescription: View bookings for an event date.

reservationNew.title: New reservation
reservationNew.holdExpired: EXPIRED — restart by picking a table
reservationNew.confirmRelease: Release this hold? You'll have to pick a table again.
reservationNew.confirmSwitchEvent: Switching events releases the current hold. Continue?

link.title: Square payment link
link.createHint: Generates a hosted Square checkout for {{amount}}.
link.regenerateHint: An active link exists. Regenerating creates a new one and supersedes the old.

checkInPass.heading: Check-in pass
checkInPass.consumed: Already consumed at the door on {{at}}.

cancel.heading: Cancel reservation
cancel.resolutionHint: REFUND issues actual Square refunds for paid Square/Cash App entries; only available when at least one provider payment exists.
cancel.confirmAgain: Are you sure? This is irreversible.

packages.listDescription: Add-ons offered to customers booking a table.
packages.empty: No packages yet. Create the first one.
packages.confirmSoftDelete: Deactivate "{{name}}"? It will hide from public browse but stay editable.
packages.confirmHardDelete: Permanently delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

field.name: Name
field.spanishHint: Leave blank to use the English copy for all locales.
